历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 7501 → 7257 → 29977 → 14961 → 15385. A significant gap occurred in 2023 (around 29977), quickly recovered to 14961 in 2024, and stabilized at 15385 in 2025. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 15385. Local science/physics category enrollment plans: 17 in 2021, 17 in 2022, 11 in 2023, 9 in 2024, 8 in 2025, showing a decreasing trend. The 2026 plan is 12, a 50% increase from 2025, significantly impacting competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university. Soft Science main ranking rose from 93rd in 2021 to 81st in 2026, steadily improving in recent years, enhancing overall strength and recognition. Reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, with only minor controversies like air conditioning fees, no major negative public opinion. Douyin heat total ranking 49th (relatively hot), once entered high heat list 7th in 2022, short video platform exposure moderately high. No abnormal filing records, relatively stable application psychology. Foreign Language and Literature is A+ (top nationally), the core advantage discipline, highly consistent with the school's language education characteristics, strongly attracting related major applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, physics category adds popular directions like Data Science and Big Data Technology (6 spots) and Actuarial Science (2 spots). Computer/data science major category has high social heat as recommended, actuarial/financial mathematics direction is relatively hot, attracting high-scoring students. Foreign language majors have general observation heat. Local 2026 total examinees 451,000, estimated physics category about 69% or 311,190, slightly fewer than 2025 (320,779), easing competition pressure slightly. Shanghai International Studies University is located in Shanghai (first-tier city), strongly attractive to Anhui examinees. Its enrollment proportion in Anhui is about 4.2% (2021: 26/618 total), recent Anhui enrollment numbers rising (2025: 66/1633 total), proportion about 4.0%, cross-province enrollment ratio stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 15385, a 50% enrollment expansion in 2026 (plan from 8 to 12) shifting ranking backward, continuous Soft Science ranking rise (81st) enhancing attractiveness, new popular majors like data science/actuarial attracting high-scoring students, and slight decrease in local physics category examinees, with moderate forward correction due to new popular majors attracting high-scoring students. Predicted minimum ranking approximately 19951, range 19451–20451.

Newly added Data Science and Actuarial Science are popular science directions at this university, competition may be intense, suggest choosing based on personal interest and mathematical ability.
